name: wp-rig/simple-rich-text
title: Simple Rich Text
description: Editorial text section with heading and two body paragraphs. Scroll-triggered word-by-word reveal animation.

bodyPrimary.default: Manufactured in Switzerland and developed with globally sourced ingredients, Eternal Labs formulations are meticulously crafted to support vitality, cellular health, and visible skin wellbeing.

bodySecondary.default: Our goal is simple: to help people feel stronger, more confident, and more vibrant in their everyday lives.
